creator: freebsd@nagilum.org
text:
The attached patch fixes http://gcc.gnu.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=52695 :
libtool: compile:  /var/tmp/export/ports/lang/gcc47/work/build/./gcc/g++ -B/var/tmp/export/ports/lang/gcc47/work/build/./gcc/ -nostdinc++ -nostdinc++ -I/var/tmp/export/ports/lang/gcc47/work/build/i386-portbld-freebsd9.0/libstdc++-v3/include/i386-portbld-freebsd9.0 -I/var/tmp/export/ports/lang/gcc47/work/build/i386-portbld-freebsd9.0/libstdc++-v3/include -I/var/tmp/export/ports/lang/gcc47/work/gcc-4.7-20120602/libstdc++-v3/libsupc++ -I/var/tmp/export/ports/lang/gcc47/work/gcc-4.7-20120602/libstdc++-v3/include/backward -I/var/tmp/export/ports/lang/gcc47/work/gcc-4.7-20120602/libstdc++-v3/testsuite/util -L/var/tmp/export/ports/lang/gcc47/work/build/i386-portbld-freebsd9.0/libstdc++-v3/src -L/var/tmp/export/ports/lang/gcc47/work/build/i386-portbld-freebsd9.0/libstdc++-v3/src/.libs -B/usr/local/i386-portbld-freebsd9.0/bin/ -B/usr/local/i386-portbld-freebsd9.0/lib/ -isystem /usr/local/i386-portbld-freebsd9.0/include -isystem /usr/local/i386-portbld-freebsd9.0/sys-include -DHAVE_CONFIG_H -I
